Author: Gabriel Innes
UsageNotes: This process is used to reverse the pack of a MasterItem from a carrying entity. It will unpack all of the specified MasterItem from the specified carrying entity. It does not allow for a unpacking a specific quantity.
ImplementationNotes: This process writes a new transaction of type UNPACK and sets the reversal ID of the original pack transaction. It will also update the packed quantity on the document detail line.
Name: BOX_PACK_REVERSAL
Description:
BOX_PACK_REVERSAL

This process is used to reverse the pack of a MasterItem from a carrying entity. It will unpack all of the specified MasterItem from the specified carrying entity. It does not allow for a unpacking a specific quantity.

This process writes a new transaction of type UNPACK and sets the reversal ID of the original pack transaction. It will also update the packed quantity on the document detail line.
